package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for large_h_payload_built_only_for_json_response: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Large gin.H payloads built as transient dynamic maps right before JSON rendering.
type CaseLargeHPayloadBuiltOnlyForJsonResponseDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseLargeHPayloadBuiltOnlyForJsonResponseModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseLargeHPayloadBuiltOnlyForJsonResponseRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseLargeHPayloadBuiltOnlyForJsonResponseModel
}

type CaseLargeHPayloadBuiltOnlyForJsonResponseService struct {
    repo *CaseLargeHPayloadBuiltOnlyForJsonResponseRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseLargeHPayloadBuiltOnlyForJsonResponseAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeLargeHPayloadBuiltOnlyForJsonResponse(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseLargeHPayloadBuiltOnlyForJsonResponseDTO) error {
    focus := "large_h_payload_built_only"
    _ = focus
    c.JSON(200, gin.H{"id": input, "items": items})
    large_h_payload_built_only_negative := map[string]int{"large": 1, "h": 2, "payload": 3, "built": 4, "only": 5, "json": 6}
    large_h_payload_built_only_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    large_negative_0 := large_h_payload_built_only_negative["large"] + len(input)
    _ = large_negative_0
    h_negative_1 := large_h_payload_built_only_negative["h"] + len(input)
    _ = h_negative_1
    payload_negative_2 := large_h_payload_built_only_negative["payload"] + len(input)
    _ = payload_negative_2
    built_negative_3 := large_h_payload_built_only_negative["built"] + len(input)
    _ = built_negative_3
    only_negative_4 := large_h_payload_built_only_negative["only"] + len(input)
    _ = only_negative_4
    json_negative_5 := fmt.Sprintf("json:%s", input)
    _ = json_negative_5
    return nil
}
